## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could be implemented (optional).

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about (optional).

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, links to Matter spec sections, etc.
